notes:
Tried the suggested launch options and Proton versions mentioned on this page, as well as several others.  With no tweaks, game launches to unresponsive black screen.  After launch options and Experimental or Hotfix Proton version, it reaches the main menu, but it's super laggy.  Crashes when I start a new game after sitting on the loading screen for a long time.

Launch options I tried:
PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%
